label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. Richard went to the bakery today, and we need to figure out between what times he could have gone. The problem gives us information about Richard's activities as reported by different people. First, Richard woke up at 8am. Then, Betty saw him reading at the library from 9am to 2pm. So between 9am and 2pm, he was at the library. Then David saw him fixing a computer at the electronic store from 2pm to 4pm. After that, Mary saw him taking photos near the Eiffel Tower from 4pm to 5pm. Then Hannah saw him on a rooftop from 5pm to 6pm. Susan
